mapper.sql: id, order_no, title, description, contact_phone, repair_address, emergency_level, expect_handle_time, status, community_org_id, complex_org_id, property_company_org_id, resident_user_id, accept_user_id, assign_user_id, maintainer_user_id, process_desc, finish_desc, reject_reason, resident_feedback, evaluate_score, evaluate_content, urge_count, accepted_time, assigned_time, processing_time, finish_time, confirm_time, closed_time, last_urge_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM biz_repair_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_repair_order ( order_no, title, description, contact_phone, repair_address, emergency_level, expect_handle_time, status, community_org_id, complex_org_id, property_company_org_id, resident_user_id, accept_user_id, assign_user_id, maintainer_user_id, process_desc, finish_desc, reject_reason, resident_feedback, evaluate_score, evaluate_content, urge_count, accepted_time, assigned_time, processing_time, finish_time, confirm_time, closed_time, last_urge_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{title}, #{description}, #{contactPhone}, #{repairAddress}, #{emergencyLevel}, #{expectHandleTime}, #{status}, #{communityOrgId}, #{complexOrgId}, #{propertyCompanyOrgId}, #{residentUserId}, #{acceptUserId}, #{assignUserId}, #{maintainerUserId}, #{processDesc}, #{finishDesc}, #{rejectReason}, #{residentFeedback}, #{evaluateScore}, #{evaluateContent}, #{urgeCount}, #{acceptedTime}, #{assignedTime}, #{processingTime}, #{finishTime}, #{confirmTime}, #{closedTime}, #{lastUrgeTime}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE biz_repair_order
title = #{title}, description = #{description}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, repair_address = #{repairAddress}, emergency_level = #{emergencyLevel}, expect_handle_time = #{expectHandleTime}, status = #{status}, community_org_id = #{communityOrgId}, complex_org_id = #{complexOrgId}, property_company_org_id = #{propertyCompanyOrgId}, resident_user_id = #{residentUserId}, accept_user_id = #{acceptUserId}, assign_user_id = #{assignUserId}, maintainer_user_id = #{maintainerUserId}, process_desc = #{processDesc}, finish_desc = #{finishDesc}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, resident_feedback = #{residentFeedback}, evaluate_score = #{evaluateScore}, evaluate_content = #{evaluateContent}, urge_count = #{urgeCount}, accepted_time = #{acceptedTime}, assigned_time = #{assignedTime}, processing_time = #{processingTime}, finish_time = #{finishTime}, confirm_time = #{confirmTime}, closed_time = #{closedTime}, last_urge_time = #{lastUrgeTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
